meta.title: Do Fighter Pilots Fly Different Jets? USAF Fighter Pilot Answers
meta.description:
One of the more common questions I get is: Do you get to fly different jets? In this video I answer that as well as if it's possible to switch from cargo aircraft to fighters and vice versa. 

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO become a FIGHTER PILOT+ Win a Patch 🔻: 
https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/pilot-newsletter

How to connect:
Podcast: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinfighterpilot/
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/justinfighterpilot/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/justinfighterpilot/

#fighterpilot
#QandA
#airforce

*Approved and adheres to AFI 1-1, USAF Social Media Policy*
